name: Path Traversal via unsanitized file path
description: User-controlled input flows into a System.IO file-access API (File.ReadAllText, File.Open, FileStream, StreamReader, ...) without path normalization or containment checks. An attacker can use `..` segments to read, write, or delete files outside the intended directory.
remediation: Normalize the resolved path with Path.GetFullPath and verify it starts with the intended base directory before using it. Prefer Path.GetFileName on user input to strip directory components. Never concatenate user input directly with a base directory.

examples.vulnerable:
string filename = Request.Query["file"];
string content = File.ReadAllText(filename);
